info.name: Roadmap Platform
info.description:
Roadmap Platform API (Vite SPA + Express gateway).

**Primary path:** gateway `http://localhost:4010` — all `/api/*` and `GET /health`, `GET /api/openapi.yaml`.

**Browser / same-origin path:** with `npm run dev` for `client/`, call `http://localhost:3001/api/*` (Vite proxies to the gateway). Override dev port with `VITE_DEV_PORT` in the environment.

**Section B** hits services directly (`4110` portfolio, `4210` template, `4410` integration, `4310` ai, `4510` worker) for debugging and `x-internal-key` routes.

URLs in requests are literal (no `{{baseUrl}}`). Set collection variables for IDs. Use `internalApiKey` when `INTERNAL_API_KEY` is set. If the gateway enforces JWT (`JWT_SECRET` + `JWT_ENFORCE_GATEWAY=1` in root `.env`), add `Authorization: Bearer <token>` to protected `/api/*` calls.

item.name: A · API Gateway
item.description: Production-style path: gateway on port **4010**. The Vite app (`npm run dev` in `client/`) serves on **3001** by default and proxies `/api` → this gateway — use `http://localhost:3001/api/...` to mimic the browser.

item.name: B · Direct services & internal
item.description: Bypass gateway or call internal HTTP (worker, imports). Same IDs as section A.
